summary: No single open canonical safely replaces closed representative #59438. The hydrated open refs split into Telegram topic labels, avatar resolution/customization, v2 UI regressions, session naming/channel UX, agent switching, and memory isolation subfamilies. No close/comment/label mutations are high-confidence in this dedupe-only run; all open refs should remain open as canonical, related, or independent follow-up trackers.
